title: Al Khawr Heat Wave
lead: Al Khawr is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.60. The city's temperature has reached extremely high levels, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Al Khawr has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 11.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 13.8 km/h. 
 The city's energy consumption is expected to rise due to the increased demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
